# Make

> AI Registry entry [AIR-20](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-20/make) — status **Rejected** as of 2026-04-01. Departments: —.

**Category:** Workflow Automation
**Status:** REJECTED

## Rejection Rationale

* **High cost** relative to alternatives
* **Limited integrations** compared to N8N
* **Restricted data manipulation** capabilities
* **General limitations** when benchmarked against N8N's flexibility and self-hosted model

**N8N (AIR-19) was selected as the preferred workflow automation platform over Make.**

*Rejected.*
